children.label: A
children.text: have been accepted for admission at such college or university;

children.label: B
children.text: will be enrolled at such college or university not later than one year after the date of such acceptance; and

children.heading: Condition
children.label: 2 Condition
children.text: The Secretary may only award a grant under this subsection to a college or university described in paragraph (1) if the Secretary determines that such college or university has established a competitive scholarship awards process for the award of scholarships to individuals described in such paragraph.

children.heading: Annual limitation
children.label: 3 Annual limitation
children.text: Of the funds made available under subsection (b)(1), the Secretary may use not more than $10,000,000 to award grants under this subsection for the academic year beginning on , and each of the 4 succeeding academic years.July 1, 2020

children.heading: Amount of grant
children.label: 4 Amount of grant
children.text: Each grant made under this section shall be in an amount of not less than $500,000.

children.heading: Funding
children.label: A Funding
children.text: Of the funds of the Commodity Credit Corporation, the Secretary shall make available to carry out this section $40,000,000 not later than , to remain available until expended.October 1, 2019

children.heading: Additional funding
children.label: B Additional funding
children.text: Not later than 30 days after , of the funds of the Commodity Credit Corporation, the Secretary shall make available to carry out this section $10,000,000, to remain available until expended.November 17, 2023

children.heading: Further funding
children.label: C Further funding
children.text: Of the funds of the Commodity Credit Corporation, the Secretary shall make available to carry out this section $60,000,000 for fiscal year 2026, to remain available until expended.

children.heading: Discretionary funding
children.label: 2 Discretionary funding
children.text: In addition to amounts made available under paragraph (1), there is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $10,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2020 through 2023.

children.heading: Administrative expenses
children.label: 3 Administrative expenses
children.text: Of the funds made available under paragraphs (1) and (2) to carry out this section for a fiscal year, not more than 4 percent may be used for expenses related to administering the program under this section.
the amount of funds provided to each eligible college or university under this section;
the number of scholarships awarded under each grant each fiscal year; and
the amount of each such scholarship.
